name: Lancer Archfiend
desc: Once per turn, when your monster declares an attack on your opponent's Defense Position monster: You can activate this effect; during that battle, if that monster attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, when your monster declares an attack on your opponent's Defense Position monster: You can activate this effect; during that battle, if that monster attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
eff: Once per turn, when your monster declares an attack on your opponent's Defense Position monster: You can activate this effect; during that battle, if that monster attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.
